selected_models.name: XGBoost
selected_models.rationale: Baseline slot for time_series_forecasting: Gradient boosted trees. High-capacity, widely used benchmark for tabular data.
selected_models.substitution_reason: No baseline-tier model available for task_type='time_series_forecasting' (all rejected or unavailable); cross-tier fallback to 'XGBoost'.

selected_models.name: RandomForest
selected_models.rationale: Classical slot for time_series_forecasting: Ensemble of decision trees. Robust, parallelizable, handles mixed types well.
selected_models.substitution_reason: Preferred model 'XGBoost' was already assigned to another tier; substituted with 'RandomForest'.

selected_models.name: Chronos
selected_models.rationale: Specialized slot for time_series_forecasting: Pretrained zero-shot forecasting transformer (Amazon). Works without feature engineering.
